## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows 2-space indent style
- [ ] Tool names use `dot.case` internally, `snake_case` for API
- [ ] Edit tools are added to `EDIT_TOOL_NAMES` in `agent.lua` if applicable
- [ ] New tool parameters have JSON Schema definitions
- [ ] Relevant tests added/updated
- [ ] README updated if feature is user-facing
